subcodes.first_line: O my God! Manifest Thou on this Festival Day Thy power and dominion over all who dwell in Thy heavens and upon Thy earth. Glory be unto Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فاظهر اللهم فی هذا العید قدرتک و سلطانک علی من فی سمائک و ارضک سبحانک
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for teaching, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause
